examples: I don't suppose they want to sell it. Oh, I can see a dartboard there.
Imagine a table made out of an old dartboard, or even a bicycle wheel!
Can a system learn to pick stocks better than a human (or for that matter, a monkey with a dartboard)?
Inside is a couch, a Viking helmet, a water gun and a dartboard for workday breaks.
It was a dart flung at a dartboard twenty thousand feet away.
